series_metadata.series_title: All Contact Centers using the Auto Call Distribution (ACD System) Finesse phone system
series_metadata.series_description: Calls recorded for quality assurance purposes when external customers call into Bureau of Workers’ Compensation.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: For every department on this CBTS provided ACD Finesse phone system that has the call recording feature enabled, retain these recordings for 90 days., Electronic: Delete
